Basic.desc: Basic test vectors use the simplest possible inputs. These inputs often overlap with inputs from standards and RFCs. One goal of such test vectors is to simply detect distinct algorithms.

Pseudorandom.desc: The test vector has been generated pseudorandomly.

RejectionSampling.desc: The test vector triggers a special case during the rejection sampling.
RejectionSampling.effect: Generating deterministic signatures incorrectly can leak information about the private key
